entry.title: Test Paper: Attention Is Still All You Need
entry.summary: We revisit the transformer architecture and propose improvements that significantly boost performance on language understanding tasks. Our method achieves state-of-the-art results on multiple benchmarks.

entry.title: Efficient Fine-Tuning with LoRA Variants
entry.summary: We compare various LoRA variants for efficient fine-tuning of large language models and find that adaptive rank selection outperforms fixed-rank approaches.
